outfit_info.outfit_description: A sophisticated look features a black floral midi dress paired with a dark cardigan for elegant layering. Tan woven accessories and pearl drop earrings complete the refined ensemble. The overall impression is one of timeless grace, suitable for a charming outdoor event.

model_attributes.body: The model has a slender physique and presents a natural, poised demeanor with classic appeal.
model_attributes.pose: The model stands gracefully, looking directly forward, holding a book in one hand and her bag's strap in the other.
model_attributes.background: A picturesque rustic cottage, adorned with climbing cream and peach roses, provides a charming garden setting.

outfit.P01101088: black floral linen and silk organza midi dress
